sourceMovie.title: Gifted
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Gifted (2017) as a drama theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The drama and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Mrs. Doubtfire
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Gifted clicked for you, Mrs. Doubtfire (1993) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Gifted?
faq.answer: Try Mrs. Doubtfire, The Kid, Fatherhood—each shares DNA with Gifted while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Gifted?
faq.answer: Gifted (2017) is best described as Drama, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Gifted worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 8.0/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
